headline: Wolverine's Brand Momentum Sets the Stage for Solid Growth in 2026
summary: WWW eyes 2026 growth after Saucony's 30% annual jump in 2025 and Q4 margin gains, guiding for mid-single-digit sales growth and up to $1.50 EPS.

headline: Jim Cramer on Tapestry: “Buy Half of It, and Then If It Falls, Buy Some More”
summary: Tapestry, Inc. (NYSE:TPR) is one of the stocks on Jim Cramer’s radar. When a caller mentioned that they researched and found out that a high number of high school students want Coach handbags, Cramer commented: Yes, and that is right. And you should own the stock. Your research dovetails exactly with what I hear from […]
